title: LlmMessageMetadata
description: LLM-specific response facts stored in Message.metadata by the LLM gateway plugin after each assistant turn.

model_used.description: Identifier of the LLM model that generated this response

finish_reason.description: Reason the model stopped generating tokens

temperature_used.description: Sampling temperature used for this response (resolved from capability value or session type default)

usage.description: Token usage statistics for this response
